raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to file a complaint against American Express. I purchased a XXXX bike back to XXXX. Among XXXX. Within one year, the rear wheel was destroyed, but the merchant did not provide the warranty service as promised. 

I contacted American Express to dispute the transaction. Three months ago, they closed the case by issuing a {$300.00} credit without proper notification or explanation. I recently contacted them again to reopen the dispute, but they refused, claiming the case had already been resolved. 

American Express 's handling of this dispute was unfair and did not comply with their own policies. I request that the XXXX investigate this matter and help me obtain a full refund. 

Sincerely,
